block_01: As the U.S. Government has temporarily halted its shutdown, the stock market carries on its third week of Q4 2018 earnings. Most notable names which are expected to release earnings include the likes of Apple, Verizon, Ebay, Tesla, Microsoft, Facebook, Amazon, Visa and Mastercard.
block_02: Here’s what you should expect from the biggest corporations releasing earnings next week!
block_03: EPS Forecast - How much of net income can be distributed for each share. Higher readings from forecasts tend to be positive for the stock.
block_04: EPS y/y - What was reported on the same quarter exactly one year ago.
